outcome_contract.why: The #new-ideas and #in-progress sections need to be separate pages so each can be focused, navigated to directly, and not compete for vertical space.
outcome_contract.intended_outcome_statement: #new-ideas and #in-progress each live at their own URL; navigation links point to each; root /process-improvements redirects or shows a landing.

engineering_coverage.applicable: Hero stat tiles become `<Link>` on each page; sub-nav rendered by `layout.tsx`
engineering_coverage.gap_or_implication: Each page keeps its own hero with cross-link tiles

engineering_coverage.applicable: Each page owns independent state; no shared state between sub-routes
engineering_coverage.gap_or_implication: Filter, pending, bulk selection all scoped per page
API routes unchanged; auth checks unchanged

engineering_coverage.applicable: Test file split: `InProgressInbox.test.tsx` + `NewIdeasInbox.test.tsx` covering same TCs as monolith test
Each page.tsx calls only its needed data functions; auto-refresh reuses same endpoint

engineering_coverage.gap_or_implication: Single operator user; marginal improvement from scoped fetches

stage_payload.summary: Split the single `/process-improvements` page into two focused sub-routes: `/process-improvements/in-progress` for active plan monitoring and `/process-improvements/new-ideas` for queue triage. The approach is full extraction: the monolithic `ProcessImprovementsInbox` client component (~1,750 lines) is decomposed into two independent client components (`InProgressInbox` and `NewIdeasInbox`), each with their own `page.tsx` server component and test file. A shared `layout.tsx` adds a sub-nav tab strip. The root route becomes a redirect. No API changes are required.
goals: `/process-improvements/in-progress` — dedicated page for active plan monitoring
`/process-improvements/new-ideas` — dedicated page for queue triage (WorkItems + Deferred + Recently Actioned)
Sub-nav tabs allow switching between the two pages
Navigation header unchanged — root `/process-improvements` redirects to `/new-ideas`; `isActive` highlighting works automatically
non_goals: Changing API routes or data model
Adding new features during the split
Adding a dedicated page for Deferred or Recently Actioned
constraints: No new API routes — existing `/api/process-improvements/items` and decision routes are sufficient
Existing `ProcessImprovementsInbox.test.tsx` tests must be ported (not lost) — same TCs, new component imports
assumptions: Deferred and Recently Actioned sections stay with New Ideas page
BulkActionBar stays with New Ideas page (queue items only)
Business filter retained on both pages (mirrors current behaviour; operator can remove from In Progress later)
`InProgressSection` null-render replaced with an empty state message on its own page
selected_approach: What was chosen: Full extraction — two new client components (`InProgressInbox`, `NewIdeasInbox`), two new sub-route `page.tsx` files, shared `layout.tsx` for sub-nav, root `page.tsx` becomes redirect.

Why planning is not reopening option selection: Analysis confirmed Option A is decisive. The private sub-components in the monolith are already logically scoped to one section; decomposition is mechanical.

task_briefs.title: Extract InProgressInbox component + create in-progress sub-route
Extract NewIdeasInbox component + create new-ideas sub-route + delete monolith
task_briefs.deliverable: New `NewIdeasInbox.tsx` client component + `new-ideas/page.tsx` server component + `NewIdeasInbox.test.tsx`; delete `ProcessImprovementsInbox.tsx` and `ProcessImprovementsInbox.test.tsx`

task_briefs.title: Add layout.tsx sub-nav + root redirect + update nav link
task_briefs.deliverable: New `layout.tsx` inside `process-improvements/`; root `page.tsx` converted to redirect; `NavigationHeader.tsx` nav link updated

areas.label: Page routing
areas.flow: Root `page.tsx` calls `redirect('/process-improvements/new-ideas')`; `layout.tsx` wraps sub-route content with tab strip
areas.seams: Rollback: revert PR restores old page.tsx

areas.label: In Progress page
areas.flow: `in-progress/page.tsx` calls `loadActivePlans()` → passes `initialActivePlans` to `InProgressInbox` → renders `ActivePlanCard` list; auto-refresh polls same endpoint every 30s using `activePlans` subset
areas.seams: If no plans, empty state shown (not null-render)

areas.label: New Ideas page
areas.flow: `new-ideas/page.tsx` calls `loadProcessImprovementsProjection()` + `loadActivePlans()` + `collectInProgressDispatchIds()` → passes all to `NewIdeasInbox` → renders WorkItemCard queue + Deferred + RecentlyActioned; auto-refresh polls same endpoint; bulk actions, defer, do, decline all function as before

areas.label: Navigation
areas.flow: Nav link href stays at `/process-improvements`; root redirects to `/new-ideas`; `isActive` (`startsWith`) highlights for both sub-routes — no nav change needed

areas.label: Sub-nav tabs
areas.flow: `layout.tsx` renders tab strip with "New Ideas" → `/process-improvements/new-ideas` and "In Progress" → `/process-improvements/in-progress`; active tab highlighted via `pathname.startsWith`
